createdScenarios.name: UTV Collab AI Core Scenario A 20260417183345
UTV Collab AI Core Scenario B 20260417183345

isolation.createdEmployeeForCrossAssertion: UTV Collab AI Core Jane Test

assertionResults.title: AI chat panel accessible from UI

steps.action: Open app shell and click toolbar AI button
steps.expected: AI panel entry point is visible and opens chat drawer
steps.observed: AI button visible in toolbar and opened right-side AI Planning Assistant panel

assertionResults.title: Submit natural language query and receive response

steps.action: Submit 'How many employees are in Engineering?' from AI panel
steps.expected: Query accepted, loading indicator shown while processing, then AI response
steps.observed: Query accepted and rendered in chat, but backend returned configuration error instead of model response

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY on server; assertion cannot be fully validated without configured AI backend.

assertionResults.title: AI responses stream incrementally

steps.action: Capture time-sequenced screenshots after submitting AI query
steps.expected: Assistant content grows chunk-by-chunk over time
steps.observed: No incremental assistant text growth; same missing-api-key error shown at each capture point

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; no stream frames available to validate incremental growth.

steps.action: Ask 'What happens if we merge Platform and Infrastructure teams?'
steps.expected: AI references real team names/employees and describes structural impact
steps.observed: UI accepted prompt but returned missing-api-key configuration error

steps.action: Ask cost-impact promotion question for Senior Engineers
steps.expected: AI returns current/projected totals and delta from scenario salary data
steps.observed: Prompt accepted but missing-api-key error returned; no numerical analysis response

assertionResults.title: AI is context-aware with real org data

steps.action: Ask 'Who reports to UTV Collab AI Core Alice Manager?'
steps.expected: AI returns accurate reports (Bob, Carol, Dave)
steps.observed: Prompt accepted but missing-api-key error returned

assertionResults.title: Error handling for API key issues

steps.action: Trigger AI query with current environment configuration
steps.expected: User-friendly errors for missing key, invalid key, and rate limit
steps.observed: Missing-key path verified with clear user-friendly message; invalid-key and rate-limit paths not feasible without changing shared server configuration/limits

assertionResults.issues: Partially validated (missing key). Invalid-key and rate-limit scenarios blocked by inability to safely mutate shared env/API quota during parallel validation.

steps.expected: AI indicates employee not found without hallucination
steps.observed: Prompt accepted but missing-api-key error returned before model inference

steps.action: After prior turns, ask follow-up 'What about Sales?'
steps.expected: AI resolves follow-up context to headcount query
steps.observed: Follow-up submitted but returned missing-api-key error

assertionResults.title: AI query reflects latest org data and selected scenario

steps.action: Create employee 'UTV Collab AI Core Jane Test' in Scenario A and verify UI
steps.observed: Jane visible in Org Chart and headcount increased to 7

steps.action: Query AI for recent additions in Scenario A
Switch to Scenario B (2 employees) and query AI again
steps.expected: AI response reflects Scenario B, not Scenario A
steps.observed: Scenario switch reflected in UI/headcount and endpoint scenarioId changed, but AI response remained blocked by missing-api-key error

evidence.network: Scenario A query: POST /api/scenarios/69e2dfa9b16554ccde84ba82/ai/query -> 503 missing_api_key; Scenario B query: POST /api/scenarios/69e2dfa9b16554ccde84ba85/ai/query -> 503 missing_api_key

assertionResults.issues: Blocked by unconfigured AI provider; scenario-aware endpoint routing observed but answer-level validation impossible.

frictions.description: Initial default browser session contained state/data from another validator run.
frictions.resolution: Switched to an isolated validator-owned identity and explicit org/scenario seed data prefixed 'UTV Collab AI Core'.

frictions.description: Named agent-browser session daemon intermittently failed to start due stale socket state.
frictions.resolution: Reinitialized session via open/login flow and continued with one active session for all assertions.

blockers.description: Anthropic backend is not configured in this environment (missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). All AI query attempts return a 503 missing_api_key response.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried through UI and directly probed /api/scenarios/{id}/ai/query for both Scenario A and Scenario B; all returned 503 with missing_api_key setup instructions.

blockers.description: VAL-AI-007 requires invalid-key and rate-limit paths in addition to missing-key behavior.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Missing-key path validated. Invalid-key/rate-limit not attempted because they require disruptive shared-environment mutation (server env key change/restart or quota forcing), disallowed in concurrent validator context.

summary: Tested 10 assigned assertions. 1 passed (VAL-AI-001). 9 were blocked due missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY causing all AI query endpoints to return 503 missing_api_key; therefore response-content, streaming, context, and cross-scenario AI assertions could not be fully validated.
